testcase.name: LoginPage accessibility > has no detectable accessibility violations in oidc mode
F0026 billing UI > renders accessible source-authorized invoices and capture workflows
F0026 billing UI > wires explicit exact application with selected receipt context
F0026 billing UI > wires reference correction and manager decision as separate flows
BrokerListPage accessibility > has no detectable accessibility violations for the broker directory route
testcase.system-err:
[MSW] Error: intercepted a request without a matching request handler:
• GET /neuron/v1/glance
If you still wish to intercept this unhandled request, please create a request handler for it. Read more: https://mswjs.io/docs/http/intercepting-requests

testcase.name: IdleWarningModal accessibility > has no axe violations when open
MVP widget accessibility (F0036-S0002) > has no axe violations in the light theme
MVP widget accessibility (F0036-S0002) > has no axe violations in the dark theme (theme smoke)
MVP widget accessibility (F0036-S0002) > labels are programmatically associated for every control
MVP widget accessibility (F0036-S0002) > controls are keyboard focusable (tab order / focus-visible)
MVP widget accessibility (F0036-S0002) > error message is announced via role=alert and aria-describedby
